# Fjarholm

Official portfolio of Fjarholm.

Independent geometric digital art inspired by Nordic nature.

## Focus

- Geometric Architecture
- Vector Outline Silhouettes
- Minimalist Pastel Art
- SVG Artwork
- Digital Craftsmanship

## Philosophy

Inspired by Nordic nature.
Built through geometry.
Refined through digital craftsmanship.

## Official Website

https://fjarholm.com

## Portfolio

https://fjarholm.com/portfolio/
